zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stapleton於大約1400年出生在英國越可爾卡爾頓時，她的父親Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III16歲，母親Agnes Goddard17歲。她於1416年1月20日與Sir William Plumpton在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年之前在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stapleton was born about 1400, in Carleton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, was 16 and her mother, Agnes Goddard, was 17. She married Sir William Plumpton on 20 January 1416, in Carleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died before 1446, in England.

Elle a épousé Sir William Plumpton le 20 janvier 1416, à Carleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1446, à Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stapleton(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 요르크실르 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Goddard(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1416년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 칼턴에서 Sir William Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Goddard, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Plumpton em 20 de janeiro de 1416, em Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1446, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stapleton родилась около 1400 г. в местности карлетон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Goddard, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Plumpton 20 января 1416 г. в местности карлетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1446 г. в местности Англия.
